---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Publications, papers, and scholarly work"
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
listing:
  - id: publications-index
    contents: ./publications.yml
    type: table
    fields: [year, title, authors, venue, type]
    field-links: [title]
    field-display-names:
      year: Year
      title: Title
      authors: Authors
      venue: Venue
      type: Type
    sort: "year desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 25
---

## Selected Publications

Total citations as of April 2025:

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xDJHVCAAAAAJ&hl=en): 10,000+ citations
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5678-5255): 0000-0001-5678-5255

### Key Papers

**Lovelace, R.** (2024). Open source tools for transport planning. *Journal of Transport Geography*.

**Lovelace, R.**, Goodman, A., Aldred, R., Berkoff, N., Abbas, A., & Woodcock, J.** (2017). The Propensity to Cycle Tool: An Open Source Online System for Sustainable Transport Planning. *Environmental Planning B*.

**Lovelace, R.**, & Dumont, S. (2016). Spatial Microsimulation with R. *CRC Press*.

### Recent Publications

See [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xDJHVCAAAAAJ&hl=en) for a full list.

### Searchable Publications Index

This table is generated from [`files/bibliography/my-citations-for-web.bib`](files/bibliography/my-citations-for-web.bib) and links to per-publication pages.

::: {#publications-index}
:::

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
